title: IFCI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Senior Consultant, Associate and More Posts
short_info: Industrial Finance Corporation of India (IFCI) ESG Advisory Positions Notification 2026 has been released on 06 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 03 vacancies have been announced through the IFCI ESG Advisory Positions Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: All Posts: Please refer to the official notification for specific age limits. Age Relaxation: Age relaxation in maximum age limit to Persons with Disabilities (PwD) candidates will be provided as per Govt. of India guidelines.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree in Management/Engineering/Finance/Economics/Climate Science/Environmental Engineering/Sustainability/Environmental Economics, Chartered Accountant, MBA (Finance), CA/CMA/CFA, Masters in Sustainability Management/Environmental Studies/Resource Management/Climate Science/Sustainable Development and Policy
qualification.details: Associate Director (ESG) (On Contract): Postgraduate degree in Management/ Engineering/Finance/ Economics/ Climate Science/ Environmental Engineering/ Sustainability/ Environmental Economics / Chartered Accountant or related fields. Preferred SCR GARP, CFA ESG qualified candidate, or any other recognized relevant qualifications. 15 years of experience in Banking/ Financial Institutions or any other sector/industry but at least 2 years of working experience in the area of ESG & Sustainability. Senior Consultant (ESG) (On Contract): Postgraduate degree in Finance/ Economics/ Management/ Chartered Accountant/ Climate Science/ Environmental Engineering/ Sustainability/ Environmental Economics or related fields. Preferred SCR GARP qualified candidates. 12 years of experience in industry and at least 4 years of experience in ESG & Sustainability. Associate (ESG) (On Contract): Masters in a relevant field (such as Sustainability Management or Masters in Environmental Studies & Resource Management or Masters in Climate Science or Master in Sustainable Development and Policy) and Additional qualifications of CFA ESG Certification and/or GARP SCR Certification would be preferred.

salary_details.pay_scale: As per market, will not be a constraint for a suitable candidate.
salary_details.details: As per market, will not be a constraint for a suitable candidate.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on qualifications and experience Interview (physical at New Delhi or online)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IFCI Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IFCI ESG Advisory Positions?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IFCI ESG Advisory Positions is 30 May 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for ESG Advisory Positions at IFCI?
faq.answer: There are a total of 03 vacancies for ESG Advisory Positions at the Industrial Finance Corporation of India (IFCI) for the year 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is through email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with required documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum qualification required for the Associate (ESG) - Research Analysis post?
faq.answer: For the Associate (ESG) - Research Analysis post, a Postgraduate degree in Climate Science, Environmental Engineering, Sustainability, Environmental Economics, Economics, or Statistics is required, along with 0-1 years of research experience in data analysis.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for IFCI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their qualifications and experience, followed by an interview, which can be conducted physically in New Delhi or online.

faq.question: Q7. Does IFCI offer any age relaxation for PwD candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, IFCI offers age relaxation in the maximum age limit to Persons with Disabilities (PwD) candidates as per the Government of India guidelines.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary structure for these contract positions?
faq.answer: The salary for these positions will be as per the market standards and will not be a constraint for a suitable candidate.

faq.question: Q9. Can freshers apply for the Associate (ESG) (On Contract) position?
faq.answer: Yes, freshers from reputed colleges/institutes are encouraged to apply for the Associate (ESG) (On Contract) position, although professionals with up to 4 years of experience are also eligible.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for IFCI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section provided in this article. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment.
